item.title: Trump’s ‘Federal 401(k)’ Plan Promises a $1,000 Match. Here’s How That Might Work
item.description: Trump revives an Obama-era idea to expand retirement accounts beyond traditional 401(k)s.

item.title: How Much Gold Should First‑Time Buyers in Their 50s and 60s Consider?
item.description: Experts recommend limiting exposure to a small portion of your portfolio.

item.title: The ‘Fun Money’ Budget Hack That Prevents Overspending Blowups
item.description: Creating a budget for guilt-free spending can help deter splurging.

item.title: Ignore the 4% Rule: This Is the Best Retirement Investing Strategy for Most Americans
item.description: Call your financial planner: The 4% rule is dead.
